query:
INSERT INTO verifications
            (guild_id, discord_user_id, claimed_ign, code, expires_at)
         VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
         ON CONFLICT (guild_id, discord_user_id) DO UPDATE
            SET claimed_ign = EXCLUDED.claimed_ign,
                code        = EXCLUDED.code,
                expires_at  = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
                created_at  = NOW()
